SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.service

Class EntrantEventService

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.service.EntrantEventService
public class EntrantEventService extends Object
Service for entrant-side event participation: joining/leaving the waiting list, accepting/declining invitations, and querying the current user's entry status.

  • Method Details

    • joinWaitingList

      public void joinWaitingList(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable Double latitude, @Nullable Double longitude, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Adds the current user to the waiting list for a specific event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      latitude - Optional latitude captured when the event requires geolocation.
      longitude - Optional longitude captured when the event requires geolocation.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • updateEntry

      public void updateEntry(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull String eventId, @NonNull WaitingListEntry entry, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)

    • leaveWaitingList

      public void leaveWaitingList(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Sets the current user's status to CANCELLED for a specific event's waiting list.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getCurrentUserWaitingListEntry

      public void getCurrentUserWaitingListEntry(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<WaitingListEntry> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves the current user's waiting list entry for a specific event.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the WaitingListEntry.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getCurrentUserWaitlistEntries

      public void getCurrentUserWaitlistEntries(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<WaitingListEntry>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all waiting-list entries that belong to the current user across events.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the user's entries.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getFilledSlotsCount

      public void getFilledSlotsCount(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Integer> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Calculates the number of filled slots for an event based on waiting list statuses. Counts entries with WAITING, INVITED, or ACCEPTED status.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the count of filled slots.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.
